title: Codonanthe decurrens
taxonomy: Codonanthe decurrens is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Codonanthe, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas. The species is further classified within the genus based on its unique characteristics, such as its growth habit and flower morphology. Codonanthe decurrens is also known to be part of the tribe Gesnerieae, which comprises various species of Gesneriaceae. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Codonanthe decurrens from other related species within the Gesneriaceae family.
